cpi.name: CPI (Inflation)
cpi.impact: Rising CPI → inflation → bad for growth stocks, good for commodities

unemployment.name: Unemployment Rate
unemployment.impact: Rising unemployment → economic slowdown → defensive stocks outperform

fed_rate.name: Federal Funds Rate
fed_rate.impact: Higher rates → pressure on valuations, good for financials/banks

yield_curve.name: 10Y-2Y Spread (Yield Curve)
yield_curve.impact: Negative spread → recession signal, historically very reliable

jobless_claims.name: Initial Jobless Claims
jobless_claims.impact: Rising claims → labor market weakening → bearish signal
